name: D & M Transportation
recent_news: No M&A or operational news found; very small operation at residential-style address (713 River St, Hyde Park). 713 River St is owned by Daniel and Michelle Pierre-Vilmont. Multiple unrelated D&M Transportation entities exist nationally; this MA entity has no discoverable web footprint as a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Likely too small (~16 employees, ~$1M rev) and undifferentiated; absent from MA DPU bus carrier and major school-bus contractor lists. Probable livery/paratransit micro-op, not a meaningful Summit tuck-in. Pass unless confirmed as yellow-bus contractor with district contracts.

name: Avanti School Bus Svc Co
recent_news: No web presence, news, or NJ Department of Education contractor-code match surfaced for Avanti School Bus Svc Co at 201 Darwin Ave, Rutherford NJ. Not listed in NJSBCA directory results.
fit_notes: Tiny ~19-employee Bergen-County operator with no online footprint; if real and active, could be a sub-contractor for Rutherford/East Rutherford/Wallington districts. Sub-scale for a stand-alone tuck-in; only interesting as a low-cost bolt-on to an existing Summit NJ branch.

name: Garden State Transport Inc
recent_news: Family-owned and operated; started 1969 as International Harvester dealership in Southampton NJ, transitioned into school-bus operations when Jonathan Brunt joined in 1997; daughter Katie Brunt-Avunduk joined 2009. Operates four offices (Southampton, Robbinsville, Freehold, Washington/Warren County). No reported sale or PE involvement.
fit_notes: Solid family-owned Central/South NJ school-bus operator with multi-office footprint (4 yards), mix of regular-ed and special-needs routes, and second-generation management nearing typical succession window. Fits Summit's NJ tuck-in thesis well; the 2nd-gen Brunts are realistic sellers within a 3-5 year window. Listed revenue of $234K likely understates real scale given 4-office, multi-district operation - worth a direct call.

name: Young Transportation
recent_news: No web presence, news, or directory match found for Young Transportation at 8775 Rose Ln, Jessup MD. Name conflicts with multiple unrelated 'Young Transportation' brands (charter coach in SC, auto-transport in PNW). Address sits in a logistics/industrial pocket of Howard County. Listed as MD-based despite state field showing TN - likely a data anomaly; physical HQ is Maryland.
fit_notes: Tagged 'special_needs' = 1, school = 0 - likely a small NEMT/paratransit van operation rather than yellow-bus school contractor. Sub-scale (~23 employees) and outside core Summit yellow-school-bus thesis. Skip unless verified as MDOT MTA Mobility/Howard County paratransit holder with student-services contracts.

name: Alpha Rehabilitation Trnsprtn
recent_news: Operating address per Yelp/Cortera is 21170 W 8 Mile Rd, Southfield MI (Franklin, MI listed in source data is likely the owner's residence). Owner Miad Konja is registered as President. Phone (248) 932-0020 and (248) 223-1568 both associated. No M&A, news, or PE involvement found.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT/wheelchair van operator (school = 0, special_needs = 1), not a yellow-school-bus contractor. ~17 employees, ~$1.2M revenue puts it well below Summit's typical tuck-in scale. Adjacent service category; only of interest if Summit explicitly wants to enter Detroit-area special-needs/NEMT student transport. Otherwise pass.
